location: Found inside a chest in a ruined bell tower in the Temple Quarter area of Liurnia of the Lakes, southwest of the Academy of Raya Lucaria — the tower sits on a small island southeast of the Temple Quarter grace, next to a ring of flowers.
tactics: From the Temple Quarter site of grace, head toward the ring of flowers and the broken bell tower southeast of it — the chest is inside
Temple Quarter is populated by Albinauric and Glintstone Flower enemies that can grab or snipe from range, so approach carefully rather than crossing the open water in a straight line
This is a somber/legendary-tier weapon: it can't be buffed with spells or consumables, nor infused with an Ash of War, so its frostbite passive and Dex scaling are fixed as-is
lore: A hatchet fitted with a blade believed to be carved from dragon scale, wreathed in a freezing fog that bites cold into anything it cuts.

builds.name: Dex frostbite build
builds.why: Strong native Dexterity scaling (C) plus a hefty 65 Frostbite buildup per hit makes it a ready-made cold-status Dexterity weapon that needs no infusion.

builds.name: Hoarfrost Stomp opener
builds.why: Its Hoarfrost Stomp skill scales unusually well for a Dexterity weapon, useful for triggering Frostbite quickly on tougher enemies before switching to a main-hand weapon.
